

-- go.mod --
module example.com
go 1.24

-- foo/foo.go --
package foo

func Add(a, b int) int //@loc(defAdd, "Add")

func UseAdd() int {
    return Add(1, 2) //@loc(callAddGo, "Add")
}

-- foo/foo.s --
TEXT ·Add(SB), $0-24 //@loc(defAddAsm, "·Add"), refs("Add", defAdd, callAddGo)
    MOVQ a+0(FP), AX
    ADDQ b+8(FP), AX
    RET
